paragraphs.title: Initialisation (Number of Records)
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.SourceType = 1
WHERE (IFNULL(mydata.SourceType, 0)= 0)
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Check Declarant
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
LEFT JOIN DECLARANT mycodes 
ON mydata.AGENCE=mycodes.CODE
SET mydata.DECLARANT = CASE WHEN mycodes.CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE mycodes.CODE END
WHERE mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Build Product
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PRODUCT = CONCAT_WS('', mydata.SH8, mydata.SHEXT)
WHERE (IFNULL(mydata.SHEXT, '')='00')
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PRODUCT = CONCAT_WS('', SUBSTRING(mydata.SH8, 1, 7), SUBSTRING(mydata.SHEXT, 2, 1), '00') 
WHERE (mydata.SH8 Like '%0') AND (mydata.SHEXT Like '0_') AND (SUBSTRING(mydata.SHEXT, 2, 1)<>'0')
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PRODUCT = CONCAT_WS('', mydata.SH8, mydata.SHEXT) 
WHERE (mydata.PRODUCT is Null)
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
LEFT JOIN HS10 mycodes 
ON mydata.PRODUCT=mycodes.CODE
SET mydata.PRODUCT = CONCAT_WS('', SUBSTRING(mydata.SH8, 1, 6), '0000') 
WHERE (mycodes.CODE is Null) 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Calculate values in USD and Euro
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.VALUSD = CASE WHEN IFNULL(RATEUSD, 0) = 0 THEN Null ELSE  VALD / RATEUSD END,
    mydata.VALEURO = CASE WHEN IFNULL(RATEEUR, 0) = 0 THEN Null ELSE  VALD / RATEEUR END
WHERE mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Calculate DDI Tax
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.DDI_VALTAX1 = 
            CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'DDI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX1, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'DDI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX2, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'DDI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX3, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'DDI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX4, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'DDI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX5, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'DDI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX6, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'DDI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX7, 0) ELSE  0 END
WHERE ( (IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'DDI') OR (IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'DDI') OR (IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'DDI') OR (IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'DDI') 
        OR (IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'DDI') OR (IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'DDI') OR (IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'DDI')) 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Calculate DDE Tax
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.DDE_VALTAX2 = 
            CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'DDE' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX1, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'DDE' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX2, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'DDE' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX3, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'DDE' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX4, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'DDE' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX5, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'DDE' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX6, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'DDE' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX7, 0) ELSE  0 END
WHERE ( (IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'DDE') OR (IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'DDE') OR (IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'DDE') OR (IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'DDE') 
        OR (IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'DDE') OR (IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'DDE') OR (IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'DDE')) 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.TVA_VALTAX3 = 
            CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'TVA' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX1, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'TVA' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX2, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'TVA' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX3, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'TVA' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX4, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'TVA' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX5, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'TVA' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX6, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'TVA' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX7, 0) ELSE  0 END
WHERE ( (IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'TVA') OR (IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'TVA') OR (IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'TVA') OR (IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'TVA') 
        OR (IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'TVA') OR (IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'TVA') OR (IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'TVA')) 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'DCI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX3, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'DCI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX4, 0) ELSE  0 END

            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'DCI' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX7, 0) ELSE  0 END

SET mydata.DAS_VALTAX5 =

        OR (IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'DAS') OR (IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'DAS') OR (IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'DAS'))

paragraphs.title: Calculate RIN Tax
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.RIN_VALTAX6 = 
            CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'RIN' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX1, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'RIN' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX2, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'RIN' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX3, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'RIN' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX4, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'RIN' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX5, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'RIN' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX6, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'RIN' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX7, 0) ELSE  0 END
WHERE ( (IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'RIN') OR (IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'RIN') OR (IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'RIN') OR (IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'RIN') 
        OR (IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'RIN') OR (IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'RIN') OR (IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'RIN')) 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Calculate FSR Tax
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.FSR_VALTAX7 = 
            CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'FSR' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX1, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'FSR' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX2, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'FSR' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX3, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'FSR' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX4, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'FSR' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX5, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'FSR' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX6, 0) ELSE  0 END
            + CASE WHEN IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'FSR' THEN IFNULL(VALTAX7, 0) ELSE  0 END
WHERE ( (IFNULL(TAXE1, '') = 'FSR') OR (IFNULL(TAXE2, '') = 'FSR') OR (IFNULL(TAXE3, '') = 'FSR') OR (IFNULL(TAXE4, '') = 'FSR') 
        OR (IFNULL(TAXE5, '') = 'FSR') OR (IFNULL(TAXE6, '') = 'FSR') OR (IFNULL(TAXE7, '') = 'FSR')) 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Calculate OTHER taxes
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.OTH_TAXES =  IFNULL(VALTAX1, 0) + IFNULL(VALTAX2, 0) + IFNULL(VALTAX3, 0) + IFNULL(VALTAX4, 0)
                        + IFNULL(VALTAX5, 0) + IFNULL(VALTAX6, 0) + IFNULL(VALTAX7, 0)
                        - IFNULL(DDI_VALTAX1, 0) - IFNULL(DDE_VALTAX2, 0) - IFNULL(TVA_VALTAX3, 0) - IFNULL(DCI_VALTAX4, 0)
                        - IFNULL(DAS_VALTAX5, 0) - IFNULL(RIN_VALTAX6, 0) - IFNULL(FSR_VALTAX7, 0)
WHERE mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Get Import Partner from Country of Origin
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PARTNER = mydata.PAYSORIGIN
WHERE   (mydata.TYPDEC  In ('IM4', 'IM5', 'IM6', 'IM7', 'IM9', 'DSI4')) 
        AND (IFNULL(mydata.PARTNER, 'CD')='CD') 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Get Import Partner from Country of Consignment
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PARTNER = mydata.PAYSLDFO
WHERE   (mydata.TYPDEC  In ('IM4', 'IM5', 'IM6', 'IM7', 'IM9', 'DSI4')) 
        AND (IFNULL(mydata.PARTNER, 'CD')='CD') 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Get Export Partner from Country of Destination
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PARTNER = mydata.PAYSDEST
WHERE   (mydata.TYPDEC  In ('EX1', 'EX2', 'EX3', 'DSE1')) 
        AND (IFNULL(mydata.PARTNER, 'CD')='CD') 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Get Other Partner from Country of Origin
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PARTNER = mydata.PAYSORIGIN
WHERE   (mydata.TYPDEC In ('DP9', 'TR8', 'DE0')) 
        AND (IFNULL(mydata.PARTNER, 'CD')='CD') 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Get Other Partner from Country of the Exporter
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PARTNER = mydata.PAYSEXP
WHERE   (mydata.TYPDEC In ('DP9', 'TR8', 'DE0')) 
        AND (IFNULL(mydata.PARTNER, 'CD')='CD') 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};

paragraphs.title: Set Partner to Default otherwise
paragraphs.text:
UPDATE `brz.asycuda` mydata 
SET mydata.PARTNER = 'ZZ'
WHERE (IFNULL(mydata.PARTNER, 'CD')='CD') 
AND mydata.BatchId=${BatchId=0};
